D2 Vision L5 Evaluate Reference

V1 Orientation Pinwheels

slide the stimulus orientation and watch the matching V1 columns light up across the pinwheel map

Each patch of V1 prefers one edge orientation, and preference rotates smoothly around pinwheel singularities — a continuous map of every angle across the cortical surface.

The colour wheel encodes each column's preferred orientation. Slide the stimulus bar's angle and watch only the matching-hue columns brighten while the orthogonal ones fall dark.
